channel.title: GitHub MATLAB Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of MATLAB in GitHub

item.title: TadasBaltrusaitis/OpenFace
item.description: OpenFace – a state-of-the art tool intended for facial landmark detection, head pose estimation, facial action unit recognition, and eye-gaze estimation.

item.title: fieldtrip/fieldtrip
item.description: The MATLAB toolbox for MEG, EEG and iEEG analysis

item.title: HuangCongQing/Algorithms_MathModels
item.description: 【国赛】【美赛】数学建模相关算法 MATLAB实现（2018年初整理）

item.title: springerlab/Flow-Cytometry-Toolkit-Old
item.description: Old version of flow cytometry toolkit code. Will delete this soon. Do not use for new analyses.

item.title: AltschulerWu-Lab/phenoripper
item.description: An easy to use, image analysis software package that enables rapid exploration and interpretation of microscopy data.

item.title: schneems/Octave
item.description: my octave exercises for 2011 stanford machine learning class, posted after the due date of course

item.title: PRML/PRMLT
item.description: Matlab code of machine learning algorithms in book PRML
